title: selaginella laxifolia
intro: Selaginella laxifolia, also known as the Loose Spike Spike Moss, is a species of spore-producing, vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella laxifolia include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Selaginella laxifolia can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
